title: isoloma fuligineum
intro: Isoloma fuligineum, also known as the smoke tree, is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in Hawaii and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isoloma fuligineum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
